sections.paragraph:
τραχηλοκοπέω (τράχηλος, κόπτω) 1 aor. subj. τραχηλοκοπήσῃς, aor. pass. ἐτραχηλοκοπήθην; pf. τετραχηλοκόπημαι behead Καῖσαρ ἐκέλευσεν … Παῦλον τραχηλο[κοπηθῆναι] AcPl Ha 9, 16; s. also 9, 25 and 27; 10, 10–11; 11, 1.

aor. aor. = aorist

subj. subj. = subjunctive; subject

pass. pass. = passive (either of grammatical form or of passive experience); also used in reference to literary portion=passage

  1. pf. = perfect

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1014
